title: Surgical system with obstacle indication system
abstract: A medical system includes a mobile cart configured to support one or more medical instruments; an illumination source mounted on the mobile cart, the illumination source configured to direct light in a direction of a path of the mobile cart during movement relative to a ground surface; and a control system operably coupled to the illumination source and the mobile cart. The control system is configured to in response to the illuminating, storing a threshold height in a memory; and automatically control the movement of the cart based on the threshold height.
claims: 1. A medical system comprising: a mobile cart comprising manipulators configured to removably mount one or more medical instruments; an object detection device mounted on the mobile cart, the object detection device configured to detect an object in a trajectory of movement of the mobile cart relative to a ground surface; and a control system operably coupled to the object detection device and the mobile cart, the control system configured to: in response to detection of an object in the trajectory of movement of the mobile cart by the object detection device, store a threshold height in a memory accessible by the control system; and automatically control movement of the mobile cart based on the threshold height.
